Get Decrypted sek by decrypting sek using appkey-->

Sample code


using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Security.Cryptography;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace DecryptSEK
{
    class Program
    {
        static void Main(string[] args)
        {

            string DecryptedSek = "";

              string encryptedSek = "v7WT+RdKBXSTweyyLaIA9oabvJCW1s6NsmC7GGHqtGLlCZqCyF1TFO3b86rJ7WI6";
         

           string appkey = "s5W/W2gjV+hCk/XjBhdG105ehsucKBXBc/5JwWz2l9U=";
       
            byte[] appkeybyte = Convert.FromBase64String(appkey);

            DecryptedSek = DecryptBySymmetricKey(encryptedSek, appkeybyte);

            Console.WriteLine(DecryptedSek);
            Console.ReadLine();

        }




        public static string DecryptBySymmetricKey(string encryptedSek, byte[] appkey)
        {
            //Decrypting SEK
            try
            {
                byte[] dataToDecrypt = Convert.FromBase64String(encryptedSek);
                var keyBytes = appkey;
                AesManaged tdes = new AesManaged();
                tdes.KeySize = 256;
                tdes.BlockSize = 128;
                tdes.Key = keyBytes;
                tdes.Mode = CipherMode.ECB;
                tdes.Padding = PaddingMode.PKCS7;
                ICryptoTransform decrypt__1 = tdes.CreateDecryptor();
                byte[] deCipher = decrypt__1.TransformFinalBlock(dataToDecrypt, 0, dataToDecrypt.Length);
                tdes.Clear();
                string EK_result = Convert.ToBase64String(deCipher);
                return EK_result;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                throw ex;
            }
        }


    }
}

Encrypting Base64 payload with decrypted sek


sample code :

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Security.Cryptography;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace GenIRNPayloadData
{
    class Program
    {
        static void Main(string[] args)
        {
            string PayloadData = "";
            string BASE64ENCODEJSON = "";
            string decryptedsek = "tpBgaMC0RmKDW7vIwiwB7YtTrO6Y/C9ptvwgEcALMns=";
            string read;

            PayloadData = EncryptBySymmetricKey(BASE64ENCODEJSON, decryptedsek);
            Console.WriteLine(PayloadData);
              read =   Console.ReadLine();

        }



        public static string EncryptBySymmetricKey(string jsondata, string decryptedsek)
        {
            //Encrypting SEK
            try
            {
                byte[] dataToEncrypt = Convert.FromBase64String(jsondata);
                var keyBytes = Convert.FromBase64String(decryptedsek);
                AesManaged tdes = new AesManaged();
                tdes.KeySize = 256;
                tdes.BlockSize = 128;
                tdes.Key = keyBytes;
                tdes.Mode = CipherMode.ECB;
                tdes.Padding = PaddingMode.PKCS7;
                ICryptoTransform encrypt__1 = tdes.CreateEncryptor();
                byte[] deCipher = encrypt__1.TransformFinalBlock(dataToEncrypt, 0, dataToEncrypt.Length);
                tdes.Clear();
                string EK_result = Convert.ToBase64String(deCipher);
                return EK_result;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                throw ex;
            }
        }

    }
}
